nasb.text: When Laban had gone to shear his flock, then Rachel stole the household idols that were her father’s.

esv.text: Laban had gone to shear his sheep, and Rachel stole her father’s household gods.

cnv.text: 當時拉班剪羊毛去了，拉結就偷了他父親的神像。

ccb.text: 那时拉班正在外面剪羊毛，拉结偷了父亲的家庭神像。

csbs.text: 当时拉班去剪羊毛，瑞秋就偷了她父亲的家族神像。
